description_long: This lamp features a streamlined, modern design with three elongated, flat blades radiating from a central cylindrical hub. The central body is robust and tapers slightly toward the mounting point, suggesting a sturdy construction. The blades are evenly spaced and have squared-off ends, giving the lamp a minimalist, industrial appearance. The entire object is finished in a dark, matte color, likely a powder-coated metal, which enhances its contemporary aesthetic. There are no visible decorative embellishments or diffusers, emphasizing function over ornamentation. The lamp is designed to be mounted overhead, making it suitable for large, open urban spaces such as garages, warehouses, or public halls.
description: A modern, three-bladed ceiling lamp with a dark matte finish and minimalist industrial design. The lamp features a robust central hub and evenly spaced, squared-off blades.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the three evenly spaced blades radiating from the central hub.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical central body and the flat, horizontal alignment of the blades.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the taper of the central hub and the symmetry of the blades.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the central mounting point and the uniform extension of the blades.
